title: Experimentation Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger experimentation foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Experimentation Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Experimentation Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good experimentation foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Experimentation Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
